title: OHEJP COVRIN D1.3 Virus isolation from wildlife (hedgehogs).
author: Monchatre, Elodie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Our aim was to optimize a protocol for trying to isolate the Hedgehog Coronavirus from faeces on sensitive cells.
steps_raw: Our aim was to optimize a protocol for trying to isolate the Hedgehog Coronavirus from faeces on sensitive cells.
